description_long: This is a classic wooden baseball bat with a smooth, cylindrical body that tapers from a thick barrel to a narrower handle. The bat is finished in a natural wood brown, with subtle grain patterns visible along its length, giving it an authentic and traditional appearance. The handle is slightly flared at the knob, providing a secure grip for the user, while the barrel is rounded and robust for striking baseballs. There are no visible markings, logos, or grip tape on the handle or barrel, maintaining a clean and minimalist look. The surface appears to be finely sanded and possibly coated with a clear varnish, resulting in a semi-glossy sheen. The bat is solid and well-balanced, suitable for use in parks, backyards, or urban recreational areas.
description: A smooth, natural wood baseball bat with a flared handle and rounded barrel, finished in brown with visible wood grain and no markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bat, highlighting the gradual taper from the thick barrel to the narrow handle.
description_view_1: End-on view of the barrel, displaying the circular cross-section and the rounded end of the bat.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the bat's length and smooth, unmarked surface.
description_view_3: End-on view of the handle, revealing the flared knob and the narrowest part of the bat.
